_publications._publicationTitle: The scaffold protein KSR1, a novel therapeutic target for the treatment of Merlin-deficient tumors.

_contextSnippet: ShRNA-A had a slightly smaller but significant effect (61.7% reduction) on proliferation...There was a 2.5-fold increase in bipolar cells among shRNA-C knockdown cells
details: Reduced schwannoma cell proliferation by 61.7% and caused 2.5-fold increase in bipolar cell morphology after 7 days
